title: Electro's Command Block Tools - CWM Addon
description: Scary Addon/ Element Survival Mod; Elemental Command Block Tools Addon for Cracker's Wither Storm Mod!
body:
Need more Speical Weapons to fight the Wither Storm? Don't worry, This mod is the right place to put your hands on! Electro's Command Block Tools is an addon for both Electro's PowerCraft and Cracker's Wither Storm Mod! Craft Element Weapons using the Enchanted Command Block Book to fight off again monsters and the Wither Storm, These tools are more powerful and don't break at all!

NOTE: This mod requries both Electro's PowerCraft and Cracker's Wither Storm Mod in order for this mod to work properly!

Version Range:

Electro's PowerCraft: 1.4.11.7.1375+

Cracker's Wither Storm Mod 4.0+

- New Command Block Weapons!
